tasks.subject: Task 1: V3 订单表迁移 + 表所有权登记
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 三张订单表(档位/充值单/提现单)DDL 落库,jOOQ codegen 产出类并完成表所有权登记与 truncate 列表登记。

**Files:**
- Create: src/main/resources/db/migration/V3__wallet_orders.sql
- Modify: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/ModuleBoundaryTest.kt
- Modify: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/AbstractIntegrationTest.kt

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- V3 含 spec §2.2 全部 check 与索引
- ModuleBoundaryTest 完整性断言登记前失败、登记后通过(key 为 jOOQ 类 simpleName)
- ./gradlew check 全绿

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/resources/db/migration/V3__wallet_orders.sql", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/ModuleBoundaryTest.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/AbstractIntegrationTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["V3 ddl with all checks and indexes per spec 2.2", "table ownership registered as jooq simple names", "check green"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: V4 权限分离 + 双连接测试基建 + 守卫探针
tasks.description:
**Goal:** gabon_app runtime role 与 migration owner 分离:V4 授权迁移、测试双连接(runtime=gabon_app / cleanup=owner)、权限与 trigger 探针。

**Files:**
- Create: src/main/resources/db/migration/V4__app_role_grants.sql
- Create: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/AppRoleGuardTest.kt
- Modify: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/AbstractIntegrationTest.kt
- Modify: src/main/resources/application.yml

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- gabon_app 对 ledger 表 UPDATE/DELETE 被权限拒
- 不平分录提交时被 deferred trigger 拒
- 全部既有测试在 gabon_app 下通过
- Flyway 走 owner 连接,truncate 走 ownerDsl

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/resources/db/migration/V4__app_role_grants.sql", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/AppRoleGuardTest.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/AbstractIntegrationTest.kt", "src/main/resources/application.yml"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["app role update/delete on ledger tables denied", "unbalanced insert rejected at commit", "full suite green under gabon_app", "flyway on owner connection"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: WalletLedgerApi + LedgerService 骨架重构
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 语义化写 API 落地,creditRecharge 迁入统一骨架(幂等门 → 开户 → 投影 → postEntries 漏斗),新增 INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE problem 与 frozenOf 读口,ArchUnit 钉死 postEntries 唯一入口。

**Files:**
- Create: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/wallet/api/WalletLedgerApi.kt
- Modify: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/wallet/api/WalletBalanceApi.kt
- Modify: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/platform/web/ProblemType.kt
- Modify: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/wallet/internal/ledger/LedgerService.kt
- Modify: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/RechargeIdempotencyTest.kt
- Modify: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/InsufficientBalanceTest.kt
- Modify: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/ModuleBoundaryTest.kt

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- creditRecharge(orderNo, customerId, diamonds) 签名生效
- 同 biz_no 异金额重放 → false 且账务不变
- postEntries 唯一生产入口,写前断言 ≥2 行且 Σ=0,ArchUnit 规则钉死
- frozenOf 契约同 balanceOf

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/wallet/api/WalletLedgerApi.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/wallet/api/WalletBalanceApi.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/platform/web/ProblemType.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/wallet/internal/ledger/LedgerService.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/RechargeIdempotencyTest.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/InsufficientBalanceTest.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/ModuleBoundaryTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new signature with leading idempotency key", "different-amount replay is no-op", "postEntries sole entry funnel pinned by archunit rule", "frozenOf returns 0 for missing account"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: 四写方法 + 并发幂等矩阵 + 不变量工具
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 补齐 freeze/settle/release/grant(含 guardedDebit),交付并发/幂等测试矩阵与全量不变量断言工具。

**Files:**
- Modify: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/wallet/internal/ledger/LedgerService.kt
- Create: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/LedgerInvariants.kt
- Create: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/WalletLedgerFlowTest.kt

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 四方法全部走 post() 骨架,守卫侧 guardedDebit
- 并发双 freeze 恰一成功,败方 INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE
- 并发同 biz_no 双 credit 恰一入账
- 五方法重放各 false 且账务不变
- 每测试终局 LedgerInvariants.assertHolds

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/wallet/internal/ledger/LedgerService.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/LedgerInvariants.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/WalletLedgerFlowTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["four write methods through post skeleton with guardedDebit", "concurrent double freeze exactly one winner", "concurrent same-bizno credit posts once", "all five methods replay as no-op", "invariants hold at end of every test"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
